OmniScript.description: Story - 486 - Facility Rate Creation - Type of Rate = Shift: Add Shift Type
OmniScript.name: ServiceAccFacilityRateCreation

omniProcessElements.name: IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords",
